prompt: Six deployment steps named A, B, C, D, E, F have these dependencies: A depends on F and C; B depends on E and C; C depends on F; D depends on B and A; E depends on A; F has no dependencies. Exactly one execution order satisfies every dependency. Reply with exactly one line containing the six letters in execution order with no spaces or separators (answer format example: ABCDEF).
notes: Uniqueness verified by brute force over all 720 permutations (verify_answers.py): FCAEBD is the only valid order.
